description: Create a professionally formatted 16-week course syllabus in Apache OpenOffice Writer using data from /home/ga/Documents/course_data.json. The document must be titled 'ENVS 410: Urban Ecology and Sustainability — Fall 2024 Syllabus' and include an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning and page numbers in the footer. Use Heading 1 style for the following sections: Course Information, Instructor Information, Course Description, Learning Outcomes, Required Texts, Course Schedule, Grading Policy, Assignment Descriptions, Course Policies, and University Policies. Include Heading 2 subsections under Course Policies and University Policies. The syllabus must feature a 16-row Weekly Schedule table (Week, Date, Topic, Reading, Assignment) and a grading breakdown table. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/ENVS410_Syllabus_Fall2024.odt.
